concept.shortdesc: Use only ultra-low sulfur diesel (ULSD) with a maximum sulfur content of 15 ppm. Using

conbody.p: Use only ultra-low sulfur diesel (ULSD) with a maximum sulfur content of 15 ppm. Using fuel with higher sulfur content will damage the diesel particulate filter (DPF).
Diesel Exhaust Fluid (DEF) / Ad-Blue: Use ISO 22241-compliant DEF only. Do not use water or any other fluid in the DEF tank.
DEF quality is critical to the proper operation of the Selective Catalytic Reduction (SCR) system. Contaminated DEF can cause system failure.
DEF consumption is approximately 3–5% of diesel fuel consumption. Monitor DEF level regularly and refill before the warning light activates.
Store DEF in a cool, dry location away from direct sunlight. DEF freezes at -11°C but remains usable after thawing. Shelf life is approximately 12 months at 25°C.
Fuel Tank Capacity: 150 litres (CD100S-7 / CD120S-7) | 160 litres (CD140S-7 / CD160S-7). DEF Tank Capacity: 20 litres (all models).
Page 241 of 500 | CD100S-7 / CD120S-7 / CD140S-7 / CD160S-7 Operation & Maintenance Manual | DL06P Tier-4
Always follow all safety precautions when operating or maintaining this equipment.
Ensure all operators are properly trained and certified before operating the lift truck.
Regular maintenance is essential to safe and efficient operation of the lift truck.
Contact your local CROWN dealer for parts, service, and technical support.
Keep this manual with the lift truck at all times for reference by operators and technicians.
Record all service and maintenance activities in the maintenance logbook.
Only use genuine CROWN replacement parts to maintain warranty and performance.
